articles.title: DESTINATIONS
articles.summary: Would you spend one dollar if it meant you could travel the world?

articles.title: META MOVIE GEN
articles.summary: Meta has trained a state-of-the-art movie model. It has 30B parameters and took 6,144 H100s to train. The model was trained on 1B images and 100m highly curated videos. Interestingly, it is a Temporal Autoencoder and Flow matching Llama. Meta released a 92 page paper, one of the most detailed research reports on the topic.

articles.title: FINLLM LEADERBOARD
articles.summary: The Open FinLLM Leaderboard offers a specialized evaluation platform tailored for financial language models. It focuses on tasks crucial for finance, such as stock movement prediction, sentiment analysis, and information extraction from financial reports.

articles.title: OLLAMA IN BRAVE BROWSER
articles.summary: Nvidia's RTX-Acceleration combined with Ollama allows for running local models in the browser.

articles.title: EMBERS OF AUTOREGRESSION FOR O1
articles.summary: Large language models have limitations due to next token prediction. However, OpenAI's o1 model was trained with a new objective over reasoning traces. Despite this change, o1 still shows signs of limitations due to next token prediction.

articles.title: CONTEXTUAL DOCUMENT EMBEDDINGS
articles.summary: This paper describes a method that is almost like a neutral TF/IDF in that it takes information from the entire corpus instead of just a single embedding document. It essentially encodes contextual information about neighboring documents. This method is state-of-the-art on MTEB.

articles.title: ENTP: ENCODER-ONLY NEXT TOKEN PREDICTION
articles.summary: This paper shows a novel design architecture for using encoder-only transformers as next token prediction models. This has been done in other ways before, but the researchers find a great way to prevent cheating. The models have hints of strong performance at scale and also are capable of in-context learning.

articles.title: THERE AREN'T MANY OPPORTUNITIES TO SPEAK DIRECTLY TO 5 MILLION TECH PROFESSIONALS—THIS IS ONE OF THEM
articles.summary: In advertising, timing is everything. Reach software developers, AI/ML engineers, executives and other tech professionals as they actively read TLDR. With 10 interest-based newsletters, TLDR helps you reach your target audience. Learn more [11] about launching your first campaign with us.

articles.title: INFINITE DATA LOADERS
articles.summary: New model testing is limited in the image domain by poor-quality small datasets like CIFAR10. This GitHub repository contains a tool that creates infinite complicated fractals as images or videos for testing.

articles.title: AUTO JOBS APPLIER
articles.summary: An immensely viral repository that uses language models to automate the job application process and add an additional layer of personalization to the process.

articles.title: PAIRWISE DISTILLATION FOR DENSE RETRIEVAL
articles.summary: This project proposes a new technique called Pairwise Relevance Distillation (PairDistill) to improve the accuracy of dense retrieval methods.

articles.title: SOLVING COMPLEX PROBLEMS WITH AI
articles.summary: This study develops high-performance graph algorithms that help solve complex, large-scale problems like detecting fraud in financial networks or finding efficient delivery routes.

articles.title: FACTUAL ACCURACY IN AI
articles.summary: Integrative Decoding is a method that enhances the factual accuracy of large language models, especially for open-ended tasks.

articles.title: LIQUID FOUNDATION MODELS: OUR FIRST SERIES OF GENERATIVE AI MODELS
articles.summary: Liquid AI has announced its first generation of Liquid Foundation Models (LFMs), which deliver state-of-the-art performance with reduced memory usage. The LFMs, optimized for various hardware, include a 1B, 3B, and 40B model and are already available on platforms like LIQUID PLAYGROUND and soon on Cerebras. These models excel in handling sequential data and offer innovations in efficiency and scaling across industries such as financial services and biotechnology.

articles.title: INTRODUCING COPILOT LABS AND COPILOT VISION
articles.summary: Microsoft is introducing Copilot Labs to trial advanced AI tools like Think Deeper and Copilot Vision.

articles.title: OPENAI'S DEVDAY BRINGS REALTIME API AND OTHER TREATS FOR AI APP DEVELOPERS
articles.summary: OpenAI announced new tools at its 2024 DevDay, including a beta Realtime API for near real-time, low-latency, AI-generated voice responses.

articles.title: MICROSOFT BRINGS AI-POWERED OVERVIEWS TO BING
articles.summary: Microsoft has launched Bing generative search, an AI-powered search feature that aggregates and summarizes web information.
